items.title: Keep .md extension in displayed file names
items.body: Do not trim the .md suffix when rendering file names in the UI.

items.title: Home page: remove first section and add search to second
items.body: Remove the first section on the home page and add search functionality to the second section.

items.title: Render files as a tree using shadcn tree control
items.body: Show files in a tree view using a built-in shadcn component/control.

items.title: Settings: configurable context/comment prefixes for copy
items.body: Add settings options to change the prefix used for context and comment when copy is clicked.

items.title: Prepend file path when copying content
items.body: When copy runs, prepend the file path at the beginning to improve context for AI agents.

items.title: Investigate how file comments/data are persisted
items.body: Document and verify where and how comment/data are persisted per file.

items.title: Settings: configurable comments delimiter
items.body: Add a settings option to configure the delimiter used between comments when copying multiple comments.

items.title: Settings: file path mode for copy (relative/full)
items.body: Add an option to include file path as relative or full path in copied output.

items.title: Add hideable document outline panel
items.body: Create a left-side panel that shows the document outline similar to MS Word. The panel should be hideable so users can toggle it on and off while editing or reading.

items.title: Add Mermaid graph rendering with raw-text comments only
items.body: Render Mermaid diagrams in markdown content. Ensure comments can only be attached to the raw Mermaid source text, not directly to the rendered graph output.

items.title: Add image preview feature
items.body: Add image preview support so users can view images more clearly from the document experience.

items.title: Enable direct document editing
items.body: Allow users to edit the document content directly within the application instead of only viewing it.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-01 Inventory SSR-specific code paths
items.body: Track all SSR-specific files, loaders, actions, and server-only utilities that must be migrated or removed. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-01.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-02 Map SSR data flows to API contracts
items.body: Document all browser data currently provided through SSR and map each flow to an explicit API contract. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-02.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-03 Extract file services
items.body: Extract markdown file listing and file-read business logic into reusable server services. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-03.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-04 Extract comment services
items.body: Extract comment persistence and mutation logic into reusable server services. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-04.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-05 Add path validation and API errors
items.body: Add shared server path validation plus normalized API error handling for file and comment routes. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-05.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-06 Implement file API endpoints
items.body: Implement GET /api/files and GET /api/files/*path endpoints. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-06.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-07 Implement comment API endpoints
items.body: Implement supported comment list/create/update/delete API endpoints. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-07.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-08 Add API integration coverage
items.body: Add integration coverage for file and comment API routes. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-08.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-09 Replace SSR bootstrap with SPA entry
items.body: Replace SSR bootstrap with a browser-only SPA entry and client router setup. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-09.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-10 Add frontend API client
items.body: Add a thin frontend API client and shared request helpers. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-10.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-11 Migrate file index route
items.body: Migrate the file index route from SSR loaders to client-side fetching. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-11.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-12 Migrate markdown reader route
items.body: Migrate the markdown reader route from SSR loaders to client-side fetching. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-12.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-13 Migrate comment UI flows to API
items.body: Migrate comment read and write UI flows to use the API client. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-13.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-15 Preserve URL behavior and route boundaries
items.body: Preserve current URL behavior and ensure client routing does not collide with /api/* routes. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-15.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-14 Add SPA loading and error states
items.body: Add loading, empty, and error states for all migrated SPA routes. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-14.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-16 Update build and start scripts
items.body: Update Vite, build scripts, and start scripts for SPA assets plus API server runtime. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-16.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-17 Update CLI startup flow
items.body: Update the CLI startup flow to serve the built SPA and API against the selected content directory. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-17.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-18 Remove SSR runtime infrastructure
items.body: Remove React Router SSR entrypoints, config, and no-longer-used runtime code. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-18.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-19 Remove SSR-only dependencies
items.body: Remove SSR-only dependencies from package.json after runtime parity is confirmed. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-19.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-20 Add SPA deep-link fallback
items.body: Add SPA fallback handling for deep links and verify refresh behavior on nested routes. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-20.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-21 Add Playwright SPA coverage
items.body: Add Playwright coverage for SPA navigation, nested-route refresh, and key comment flows. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-21.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-22 Update docs for SPA/API architecture
items.body: Update README.md and migration docs to reflect the SPA/API architecture and commands. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-22.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-23 Run final verification and cleanup
items.body: Run final verification: typecheck, build, CLI validation, desktop/mobile checks, and dead-code cleanup. Source: SPA_API_MIGRATION_PLAN.md ticket SPA-API-23.

items.title: [SPA-API] Phase 1 Baseline and isolation
items.body: Parent item for SPA/API migration phase 1. Covers SSR inventory, data-flow mapping, service extraction, and API contract definition.

items.title: [SPA-API] Phase 2 Create API layer
items.body: Parent item for SPA/API migration phase 2. Covers API routes, shared validation, and API-level test coverage.

items.title: [SPA-API] Phase 3 Convert frontend to SPA
items.body: Parent item for SPA/API migration phase 3. Covers SPA bootstrap, API client, route migration, and UI state handling.

items.title: [SPA-API] Phase 4 Remove SSR infrastructure
items.body: Parent item for SPA/API migration phase 4. Covers build/runtime updates, CLI changes, SSR removal, and dependency cleanup.

items.title: [SPA-API] Phase 5 Hardening and cleanup
items.body: Parent item for SPA/API migration phase 5. Covers deep-link fallback, end-to-end coverage, docs, and final verification.

items.title: [SPA-API] SPA-API-18A Remove legacy SSR fallback handlers
items.body: Audit and remove legacy React Router SSR fallback behavior and transitional server-rendered route fallbacks. Verify production runtime no longer depends on SSR fallback handlers once SPA deep-link fallback is in place.
